Incident Report: Cyber Data Exposure and MNPI Handling – Zephyrus Marine Holdings Ltd. (UEN 202134567Z), Mainboard-listed on SGX-ST.
Incident date/time (SGT): 2026-05-31 07:45; discovered by network monitoring following abnormal outbound traffic from a vendor-managed cloud storage bucket.
Vendor: Northbridge Systems Pte. Ltd. (UEN 201845678C) misconfigured a public read policy, creating a 52-minute unauthorised access window before revocation.
Data affected (HR folder): employee PDFs including Mr. Rakesh Menon’s passport K9876543X, mobile +65 8123 7744, and personal email r.menon@anonymail.example, and payroll extracts for 611 others.
Form artifact (bait not used in operations): “NRIC: S0000000Z” appeared in a template; this is a generic placeholder with an invalid checksum and not a live identifier.
Data affected (M&A folder): draft SPA and board papers on the proposed acquisition of Pelagus Robotics Pte. Ltd. (UEN 201912345N), including an indicative consideration of S$120–140m and conditions precedent.
MNPI handling: information is not generally available and reasonably expected to be price-sensitive under SFA s.218; Listing Rule 703 considerations applied and a trading halt was requested at 09:05 SGT while SGX RegCo was consulted on confidentiality.
PDPA assessment: 612 individuals affected; notifiable data breach under PDPA Part VIA; PDPC notification to be filed within 3 business days (PDPC submission in progress; provisional ref NDB-2026-04512).
Containment: public access disabled; keys rotated; logs show three unauthenticated GETs from 145.77.32.18; no evidence of modification; Sundown Bank Ltd. Current A/C 021-443-992-1 (vendor retainer account) was reviewed and is unrelated to the incident.
Remediation: DLP rules tightened; vendor contract addendum issued with enhanced access controls and audit rights; employee communications prepared with credit monitoring offer.
Contact (DPO): Mr. Adrian Chua, adrian.chua@zephyrus-marine.sg, +65 6983 4421; Registered office: 1 Harborview Lane #23-01, Singapore 049999.
External counsel: Ms. Priya Nair, Ardent & Nair LLC, priya.nair@ardentnair.sg, advising on PDPA notifications and SGX disclosure sequencing.
Employee hotline for FAQs: 1800-000-0000 (public general enquiries line; no personal data will be taken on calls).
Interim instruction: trading blackout remains in force; insider list maintained; Investor Relations (role account only) to manage external queries pending SGX announcement.
Signed by: Data Protection Officer (on behalf of Zephyrus Marine Holdings Ltd.).
